channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 6 Yoga Poses That May Support Liver Health
Could Drinking Coffee Affect Your Cholesterol?
item.description: Coffee is often praised for its health benefits. But research suggests it may also affect cholesterol levels. Here’s what to know about the connection...

item.title: Can't get a prescription renewed? Here's how to cope with prior authorizations
item.description: These health care hurdles can stand in the way of getting treatment your doctor says you need. Here's what to know about how to deal with them.

item.title: It's Time To Wash Your Makeup Brushes — Our Easy DIY Guide & Recipe
item.description: Be honest: When is the last time you washed your makeup brushes?

item.title: Forget Biohacking — Here's What Longevity Really Looks Like for Women
item.description: Modern medicine has long treated women's health as a series of isolated chapters. Longevity care reframes the entire story.

item.title: The Results Are In & This Is The Dirtiest Spot On Most People's Desks
item.description: For those working from home, it's important to regularly clean your desk space.

item.title: This Spice Can Alleviate PMS: Here's How To Take It For Max Results
item.description: We spoke with a "spice expert" on how supplementation can curb symptoms of PMS.

item.title: An Esthetician Shares How To Fix "Oily Dehydrated" Skin
item.description: Skin care concerns—and sometimes types—are never mutually exclusive.

item.title: Surgeon general nominee Means questioned about vaccines, birth control and financial conflicts
item.description: During a confirmation hearing, senators asked Dr. Casey Means about her current positions and her past statements on a range of public health issues.

item.title: Hundreds of American nurses choose Canada over the U.S. under Trump
item.description: More than 1,000 American nurses have successfully applied for licensure in British Columbia since April, a massive increase over prior years.

item.title: Here are 5 health topics Trump avoided in his SOTU speech
item.description: Despite President Trump's aim to make health care a "Republican issue" for the midterms, his speech left out scientific research, MAHA, abortion and r...

item.title: China and the U.S. alter foreign aid strategies
item.description: China's foreign aid strategy has shifted in the last few decades Now its model may be the one the U.S. is adopting even as China moves away from it.
